ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., XS, S, M) */,
  "bust" REAL /* Bust measurement in centimeters */,
  "waist" REAL /* Waist measurement in centimeters */,
  "hip" REAL /* Hip measurement in centimeters */,
  "us_size" TEXT /* US size equivalent (e.g., XS(0-2), S(4-6)) */,
  "eu_size" TEXT /* European size equivalent */,
  "uk_size" TEXT /* UK size equivalent */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country or region for which the size is applicable */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the size was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product category */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the price is listed */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for which the product is intended */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group for which the product is intended */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season for which the product is suitable */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the product was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_variants" (
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product variant */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size */,
  "color_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the color */,
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the material */,
  "inventory_count" INTEGER /* Number of units in stock */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the product variant */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the product variant was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_variants_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_variants_color_id FOREIGN KEY ("color_id") REFERENCES colors ("color_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_variants_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_variants_material_id FOREIGN KEY ("material_id") REFERENCES materials ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the brand */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the brand's logo */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the brand was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "colors" (
  "color_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each color */,
  "color_name" TEXT /* Name of the color */,
  "hex_code" TEXT /* Hex code of the color */,
  "rgb_code" TEXT /* RGB code of the color */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the color was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("color_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "materials" (
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material */,
  "material_name" TEXT /* Name of the material */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the material */,
  "fiber_content" TEXT /* Percentage of each fiber in the material */,
  "care_instructions" TEXT /* Care instructions for the material */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the material was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "warehouse_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the warehouse */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the warehouse */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the warehouse */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the warehouse was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product variant */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the warehouse */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product variant in stock */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Threshold level to trigger a reorder */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the inventory record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_variant_id FOREIGN KEY ("variant_id") REFERENCES product_variants ("variant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order */,
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product variant */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product variant sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Price at which the product variant was sold */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the sale was made */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the sale */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the sale was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_variant_id FOREIGN KEY ("variant_id") REFERENCES product_variants ("variant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the order was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., placed, shipped, delivered) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Address to which the order will be shipped */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Address for billing */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the order was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the customer */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Customer's date of birth */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the customer record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return */,
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sale */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date the return was processed */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the return (e.g., pending, approved, declined) */,
  "return_amount" REAL /* Amount refunded for the return */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the return was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_sale_id FOREIGN KEY ("sale_id") REFERENCES sales ("sale_id")
)
